title: erigeron fastigiatus
intro: Erigeron fastigiatus, also known as Bachelor's Button or Dwarf Fleabane, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States and Canada, characterized by its small, daisy-like flowers and upright stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Consuming Erigeron fastigiatus has been linked to various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Erigeron fastigiatus is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
